title: AircraftModel entity (ONT-E-02)
description: An aircraft model/type (e.g. Boeing 737-MAX-8, Airbus A320neo, Comac C919). Composes entity.base.schema.json (which composes _meta.schema.json#/$defs/baseFields). Schema version: 0.1.0.

manufacturer.description: Manufacturer name as it appears on the type certificate (e.g. 'Boeing', 'Airbus', 'Comac'). Free-text in v0.1.0; v0.2.0+ may link to Organization entity URI.

model_designation.description: Manufacturer model designation (e.g. '737-MAX-8', 'A320neo', 'C919'). Distinct from i18n.label which is the human-readable display name.

type_certificate.description: Optional. Type certificate identifier (e.g. 'TC-A20WE' for FAA, 'EASA.A.064' for EASA). Free-text in v0.1.0.

configuration_variants.description: Optional. Sub-variants of this model (e.g. 'MAX-8-200', 'MAX-8-LR'). Free-text strings for v0.1.0; v0.2.0+ may promote to its own entity type.

ata_chapter_applicability.description: Optional. ATA iSpec 2200 chapter codes that apply to this model. Validated against ontology/vocabularies/ata-chapters.yaml at runtime by Phase 3 validator. Pattern here is structural only; enum membership is loaded dynamically.

first_flight_date.description: Optional. ISO-8601 date of first flight (e.g. '2016-01-29' for 737-MAX-8).

certification_basis.description: Optional. Free-text reference to the regulatory basis (e.g. 'FAR Part 25 Amendment 25-145', 'CS-25 Amendment 27').
